user.title: Search USGS Stream Gauges
user.description:
Search by stream or station name, or paste a USGS site number directly (e.g. 06710247).

[Find gauges on the USGS Water Resources site]({usgs_url})

data_description.search_term: Part of a stream name (e.g. "Bear Creek") or a USGS 8-digit site number
data_description.state_code: Required for name searches — two-letter US state abbreviation (e.g. CO, CA, WA). Not needed when entering a site number directly.

select_site.title: Select a Gauge Station
select_site.description: Found {count} matching stations. Stations may show as Unavailable in winter if seasonally decommissioned.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the USGS API. Check your internet connection.
error.no_sites_found: No active stream gauges matched. Try a broader name or a different state code.
error.search_required: Please enter a stream name or site number.
error.state_required_for_name_search: A state code is required when searching by name (e.g. CO). To search nationwide, enter a site number directly instead.

abort.already_configured: This gauge station is already configured.
